_doc: edpa-adapter Agent Card contract — dotted field path -> expected value, asserted against the raw JSON served at /.well-known/agent.json. Grounded in agent-service-app AgentCardController.buildCard() + the adapter's application.yml (spring.application.name=versatile-adapter, openjiuwen.service.a2a.* overrides). provider.organization is NOT pinned here (its value is the empty string "" — see the providerOrganizationIsNotBlank 争议点 in EdpaAdapterCardDiscoveryTest); skills are asserted separately via cardDeclaresVersatileBankProxySkill. The legacy top-level url/preferredTransport are deprecated (validated as 'emitted' in the topLevelUrlAndPreferredTransportAreAbsent 争议点), so neither is pinned here.
name: versatile-adapter
